message:
fix(leak): cap accumulating_title and BasicHistory to prevent unbounded growth [ft-3kxe.1]

Two memory leak vectors in vendored terminal crates:

1. accumulating_title (term/performer.rs): TmuxTitle escape without
   StringTerminator caused unbounded String growth. Capped at 8 KiB
   with discard-and-warn on overflow.

2. BasicHistory (termwiz/history.rs): Line editor history VecDeque grew
   without bound in long-running sessions. Capped at 1000 entries with
   oldest-first eviction.

Both patches include regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
